summary: Twelve military armored vehicles assessed, all showing NO DAMAGE and confirmed operational status, moving in formation across a dusty, arid terrain. The full scene depicts a continuous column of tanks kicking up significant dust as they traverse a dry, uneven field under a partly cloudy sky. The consistent NO DAMAGE assessments across all targets indicate the formation is fully functional and actively engaged in movement without observed combat damage or mechanical failure.
